messages.body: Thank you so much
Hey Kristopher, I hope everything is fine!
Absolutely, can they talk in the morning at 10 central time?
You and your business have been important to me, and I genuinely hope we can reconnect down the road when the timing feels right for you.
In the meantime, I'm sending you and your wife my warmest thoughts. I hope this year brings you both good health, happiness, and everything you're hoping for.

I want you to know that the door is always open. Please save my number and email – +1 9783125094 and kanak.s@zoca.com.  Whenever you're ready to work together again, I'll be here and happy to welcome you back.
Hello Kristopher, I spoke with my Client Experience Head, and we've processed your cancellation request as you asked. While I'm sad to see you go, I completely understand and respect your decision.
No worries Kristopher.
I absolutely understand this. Please let me have a word with my Client Relations Head and would get back to you shortly.
Greetings Kanak, i would like to start the process of cancelling zoca, i am not in a space to be using this.
I pray for good health for you and your wife.
Sure Kristopher, thank you for understanding.
Take care, Kristopher.  Wishing you all the good luck for your business!!
The Client Experience Head would be available on Tuesday. Would it work for you?

No worries at all, Kristopher. Please take care, and if there's anything I can help you with – anything at all that I'm able to assist with – I'd be more than happy to do so. Don't hesitate to reach out.
Thank you for your understanding, i appreciate the next two months, truly, as i unthaw i will be back tk business.
Kristopher, I'm so sorry about your baby. I can't imagine the pain you're going through. Please focus completely on your family. I won't disturb you until you're ready.

I understand if you want to cancel completely, but I want to be honest with you, stopping the optimization would hurt your rankings and the work we've built together would be lost. That's why I'm suggesting we keep it ru…
I've turned off all billing and you won't be charged for the next two months.
Hey Kristopher
Hi Kanak, i have going through a period of deep grief as we lost our newborn a few days after he was born. at this time i want to cancel zoca. Can you let me know how to do so?
Sending you strength Kristopher, Kanak
I am lookibg tj cancel my zoca account, how can i go about beginning this process?
Thank you for calling Sacred Grove Sanctuary. You've reached Christopher. I'm sorry that I missed your call.
I hope you had a lovely weekend!!
Hey Kristopher
I've completed the requested changes. Please review them when you have a chance, and let me know if anything else needs adjustment.

Also I was going through your profile lately and spotted a few things I'd love to chat with you about. Nothing urgent or worrying, just some proper opportunities to get you showing up better online and bringing in more c…
I know you're busy running the business, so just let me know when suits you for a quick call and I'll ring you back then. Happy to work around your schedule. Looking forward to catching up properly.
Hello Kristopher
Just a heads-up! The changes has been done from our end and it would soon reflect on the landing page too.
I tried calling you earlier from this number +1 978 312 5094 but couldn't get through. I know unknown numbers don't always show up properly!
Sorry it has been a long day, are you svailable tomorow at all?
No problem!!
Thank you for calling Sacred Grail Sanctuary. You've reached Christopher. I'm sorry that I missed your call. If you're looking to set up an appointment...
Here is my phone number: +1 9783125094
That sounds good, are you available tomorrow morning from 9-12?
I wanted to touch base with you regarding your website and its sync.
Sorry i missed these until just how
Hello Kristopher
Can I call you?
I hope you are doing well!
Hey Kristopher
Hello.

Please send me the vagaro link too.
Hey!
Thank you sharing the Vagaro link.

I've already submitted the request on my side. However, since the weekend is in between, there might be a slight delay in processing. You should expect everything to be completed by Monday evening at the latest.
Yes Kristopher
My pleasure Kristopher
Questio for you, are you familiar with the google voice calls that claim people are searching with google voice but cannot find us? I get so many of them, i am pretty sire they are a scam.
Here is my calendly link: https://calendly.com/kanak-s-zoca/zoca-call?utm_term=62146&utm_content=3696
I'll keep you updated on the progress!
